dangerZones: Azure credential rotation - verify all service principals before updating
OpenAI API key changes - requires coordinated deployment across all dependent services
Database schema migrations - must include rollback scripts
notes: Primary AI orchestration platform with multiple downstream dependencies
All deployments require staging validation before production promotion
Monitor OpenAI token usage and rate limits closely during peak hours

dangerZones: API contract changes - breaking changes require versioned endpoints
Authentication provider configuration - impacts all connected clients
Background job queue modifications - can cause processing delays or duplicates
notes: Core backend service powering SNAC v2 platform
Maintains strict backward compatibility for mobile app clients
Scheduled maintenance windows: Sundays 2-4 AM UTC

dangerZones: Component library updates - may introduce breaking style changes
State management refactoring - affects multiple feature modules
Build configuration changes - can impact bundle size and performance
notes: Frontend application under active development with frequent feature additions
Coordinated releases with snac-v2-backend on bi-weekly cadence
Design system migration in progress - avoid mixing old and new component patterns
